title: Telegram message exceeds size limit
symptom: When sending a message through the Telegram node, n8n throws a 'Request Entity Too Large' error. This occurs when the message content exceeds Telegram's maximum allowed size.
not_this_if: Messages are within Telegram's size limits
root_cause: Telegram has a strict limit on the size of messages that can be sent. If the content generated by the workflow exceeds this limit, Telegram will reject the request, resulting in a 413 error.
fix_steps: Split the output data into smaller chunks
Alternatively, send a summary message and attach the full data as a file
agent_instruction: Implement message splitting or summarization to comply with Telegram's size limits.
